alt: A male and female mandarinfish rising together cheek-to-cheek during their famous dusk mating dance
caption: Every evening at dusk, bonded pairs perform a spectacular spawning dance, rising cheek-to-cheek above the reef to release their gametes.
acquisitionNotes: Stunning high-resolution photograph capturing the iconic cheek-to-cheek dusk mating ascent. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/05/Peces_mandar%C3%ADn_%28Synchiropus_splendidus%29%2C_Anilao%2C_Filipinas%2C_2023-08-24%2C_DD_233.jpg
attributionText: Photo by Diego Delso via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 4.0
